Hero.sub: EcoMate connects your Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp orders directly to your dashboard. High-converting AI chatbots synced with ManyChat and Yalidine — built for Algerian SMEs.

Integrations.badge: Connects seamlessly with the platforms your customers already use
Integrations.tools: Keep using the tools you love

Features.sub: EcoMate brings every capability into one seamless, affordable system — powered by real AI, built for real results.

s1.title: AI Sales Chatbot
s1.desc: Automate conversations on IG & FB — from first message to order.

s2.title: EcoTrack Fulfillment
s2.desc: Real-time delivery tracking across 58 Wilayas via Yalidine.

s3.title: ePayment Integration
s3.desc: Secure digital payment flows built for the Algerian market.

s4.title: Web Development
s4.desc: Custom e-commerce sites and landing pages built to convert.

s5.title: Landing Pages
s5.desc: High-converting campaign pages designed and deployed fast.

s6.title: Content & Stock
s6.desc: Product photography and inventory organization in one place.

s7.title: Creative Studio
s7.desc: Branding, graphic design, and ad creatives for your brand.

s8.title: Marketing & Growth
s8.desc: Social media management and strategies for Algerian behavior.

How.sub: We handle the complexity so you can focus on growing your business.

s1.title: Tell Us Your Business
s1.desc: Sign up and describe your activity. A quick onboarding call takes under 30 minutes.

s2.title: We Set Everything Up
s2.desc: Our team configures your AI chatbot, catalog, and dashboard.

s3.title: Connect Your Channels
s3.desc: Link your social pages and delivery partner in one click.

s4.title: Launch & Scale
s4.desc: Go live. Your AI handles orders 24/7.

Dashboard.sub: Real-time order tracking, revenue monitoring, and customer insights.

AI.sub: Our AI Sync Engine bridges ManyChat and your EcoMate Dashboard. It handles the full journey—from DM greeting to Yalidine tracking.

features.title: Real-time DM Sync
features.desc: Every conversation on IG & FB is mirrored in your EcoMate CRM instantly.

features.title: Automated Catalog
features.desc: AI presents your products in chat as rich galleries. Real-time stock sync.

features.title: Instant Order Ingestion
features.desc: Orders picked up by the AI are logged and ready for Yalidine in 1 click.

features.title: Automated Logistics
features.desc: Auto-sync with Yalidine for zero-manual-entry fulfillment across all wilayas.

form.success: Account created! Please verify your email.
form.error_length: Password must be at least 8 characters

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.p1: At EcoMate, we are committed to protecting your business and customer data under international standards and local Algerian regulations.

sections.p: We collect data necessary for providing AI sales automation, including social media IDs, contact info, and transaction details.
Your data is encrypted and stored in secure Supabase environments with strict access controls.
We do not sell your data. We only share it with essential partners like Chargily (Payments) and Yalidine (Fulfillment) to fulfill your service requests.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.p1: By using EcoMate, you agree to our terms for B2B SaaS usage in Algeria.

sections.p: Plans are billed monthly or annually. Failure to pay will result in service suspension after a 7-day grace period.
You are responsible for all content sent via your AI chatbot. Illegal or spam activities will lead to account termination.
EcoMate provides the software bridge to Yalidine. Physical delivery issues remain subject to Yalidine's merchant terms.

404.title: Page Not Found
404.sub: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

Global.title: Something went wrong
Global.sub: A critical error occurred. Our engineers have been notified.
